caption: A man with glasses, headphones, and a tall, gray, pointed wig sits in a studio setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and beige suspenders. He is positioned behind a black microphone, and the background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on hangers, including one with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen graphics appear on the left and right sides of the frame; the left graphic includes a microphone icon and the text "TALK JOY PODCAST," while the right graphic features a red logo and the text "TALK JOY." Across the frames, the man remains relatively still, slightly shifting his head and gaze as he looks toward someone off-camera, maintaining a neutral expression while engaged in a conversation within the podcast environment.
